title: Crispy Korean Cabbage Salad
description: A crunchy and flavorful salad with crispy ingredients and the bold taste of Korea. This simple recipe can be prepared in under an hour.
instructions: Wash the Korean cabbage and cut it into thin strips.
In a pan, heat 1 tbsp of oil over medium heat.
Add the crispy garlic and cook until fragrant.
Add the crispy shallots and cook for another minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked cabbage, crispy garlic, and crispy shallots.
In a small bowl, whisk together the rice vinegar, gochujang, salt, and pepper.
Pour the dressing over the cabbage mixture and toss to coat.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve.
